notes: Baseline: d independent assets, no drift, unit volatility.
Mean-shift: first 5 of 20 assets drift +0.05, same identity covariance as A.
Correlation blocks: sector/block co-movement between some assets, zero drift. Blocks: ch0-4 rho=0.5; ch5-9 rho=0.3.
Common shock: a shared market factor (vol 0.3) plus unit idiosyncratic noise drives all assets to co-move.
